text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to let an exhausted Super Creek rest in
the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm so terribly sorry for making you worry.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Honestly, I should be the one taking care of you...
choice_data_list: All I want you to do now is rest.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'll do just that. Good night, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Is this... a dream? I mean, it has to be, right?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Aaawww! How adorable! Come here, you little
cutie-pies!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, you're so good at crawling! All that hard
work deserves a rock-a-bye reward! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh... I guess it really was a dream.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but I'm glad I could hold such adorable
versions of the three of them.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I feel all energized now. I have to let Trainer
know! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek apparently got to hold the baby
versions of Inari One, Tamamo Cross, and Oguri
Cap. I don't quite get it, but I'm glad she's feeling
better.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Come on, just a little more...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
So it was a dream... What a shame. I could watch
them forever.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Aww, I wish I got to hold them before waking up. Sigh...
